title: Validation of a Mammalian Cell-Based Fluorescent Reporter Assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2gsn5","text":"Evaluate performance of fluorescence-based reporter assay in HEK293 cells with Bxb1 integration site using variants of interest compatible with Bxb1-site integration site generated by site-directed mutagenesis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bjn4s","text":"D-PBS: No calcium or magnesium ( ThermoFisher; 14190250)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fnigi","text":"DMEM: High glucose \u0026 pyruvate (Fisher; 11995073)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bsn8e","text":"TrypLE (Fisher; 12-604-013)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"396tg","text":"FuGENE‱ 6 Transfection Reagent (Promega; E2691)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":6,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"dnh8j","text":"100mm Surface Treated Tissue Culture Dishes (Fisher; FB012924)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8650e","text":"6-Well Surface Treated SterileTissue Culture Plates (Fisher; FB012927)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f8ll9","text":"HEK293T-Rex Bxb1 Landing-Pad Cell Line (Roth Lab)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dtptl","text":"Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) ( Fisher; A5670701)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3fir9","text":"Penicillin-Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL; Fisher; 15140163)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"29hcl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"F0DBDBE9FACE11F094F90A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}}}}
steps: Culture reporter HEK293 cell line in DMEM + 10% FBS and 1xPS: Maintain healthy cells by passaging every 2-3 days Ideally, use cells that are not greater than 80% confluent on transfection day

Prepare cells for flow cytometry: 1. Expand the cells to a 10cm dish/variant to expand cells for flow cytometry. 2. After the expansion (~ day 7 post transfection), trypsinize, then inactivate with DMEM + 10% FBS + 1X 1X Pen-Strep, washing in PBS, and resuspend cells in BD FACS Pre-Sort buffer. 3. Aim for 2-5M/FACS tube through a filter cap.
Cell line maintenance 24 hours after transfection, replace media to DMEM + 10% FBS + 1X Pen-Strep.

Same day seeding and transfection: Trypsinize cells, then re-suspend in antibiotic-free media (DMEM + 10% FBS) and count. Plate cells (40K cells/well) in a 6-well dish Aim for three replicate wells per varian. Use antibiotic-free media (DMEM + 10% FBS)! 3. Transfect variants, including wild-type, negative controls, mCherry+ only, and GFP+ ~30 minutes after plating the cells (or approximately the length of time needed to prepare the transfection mixtures) use FuGENE6 at a 10:1 ratio by mass of variant DNA:Bxb1 recombinase.

Flow cytometry analysis: Run flow cytometer, using single-fluorescent controls for compensation. Select live, single cells, with mCherry+ expression and no BFP expression. Compare GFP expression of cells based on above gate to validate assay A shift in peak distribution should be observed in variants which are expected to perform better. These distributions may overlap, but it should be possible to set a gate at which there can be enrichment for functional (or less-functional) variants (e.g., top 10% of GFP distribution includes all functional variants).
creator: Warren van Loggerenberg
